name: Egg Foo Yung
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chopped cabbage or Bean Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground beef, chopped onion, cabbage or bean sprouts, and salt together.
2. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into a hot, oiled frying pan.
3. Push the mixture in as it cooks to form flat patties.
4. Brown both sides of the patties.
5. Serve hot with sauce and rice.
SAUCE:
1. In a small saucepan, mix together 1/4 cup soy sauce, 1 tablespoon corn starch, 2 teaspoons sugar, 1/4 teaspoon vinegar, and 1 1/2 cups chicken broth (or water and chicken bouillon).
2. Heat the mixture to boiling, stirring constantly.
